segments.title: Modify response status and headers
segments.summary: Introduces ability to modify Response status and headers directly on the Response object. Describes friction with renderToString/renderToStream and positions this as a quick unblock for downstream usage. Mentions renaming request info to HTTP messages and deprecating headers field in favor of setting on Response.
decisions: Accept ability to set response status and headers

segments.title: Type mismatch in worker.tsx noted
segments.summary: Reviewer reports a type mismatch for Document props in worker.tsx, likely caused by returning the element from an interruptor after enabling response status setting. Notes it is not directly related to this PR. Reviewer indicates they will investigate next while proceeding to merge and release.
actions: justinvdm: investigate and fix Document type mismatch
decisions: Merge and release despite unrelated type issue

segments.title: Release announcement
segments.summary: Reviewer posts release links indicating the change shipped in v0.2.0-alpha.2 and v0.1.29.
